query:
-- Of the 23,295 manual pending contacts, how many are linked to active projects?
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN cp.contactId IS NOT NULL THEN 'project_linked' ELSE 'orphan_crm' END as linkStatus,
  CASE WHEN c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 'has_email' ELSE 'no_email' END as emailStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' AND c.enrichmentSource = 'manual'
GROUP BY linkStatus, emailStatus
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- Of the 23,295 manual pending contacts, how many are linked to active projects?
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN cp.contactId IS NOT NULL THEN 'project_linked' ELSE 'orphan_crm' END as linkStatus,
  CASE WHEN c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 'has_email' ELSE 'no_email' END as emailStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' AND c.enrichmentSource = 'manual'
GROUP BY linkStatus, emailStatus
ORDER BY count DESC;
